categories.description: Adverbs describing manner, frequency, scope, or degree of action without inherent positive or negative emotional valence

categories.description: Adverbs describing the degree, intensity, or dramatic quality of actions, sensations, and utterances; conveys overwhelming, vivid, or emphatic manner.
